rationale: Che et al. (2007) is cited in the core modeling section when the authors justify their estimation design as "similar to Che, Sudhir, and Seetharaman (2007)." This is not a peripheral literature-list mention; the two-step procedure is central to how the paper is identified and estimated and to later game-form comparisons. The citation functions as methodological precedent that the current study transfers to a different empirical setting.
relation_description: The citing paper adopts the two-step structural demand-supply estimation logic used in Che et al. (2007): it first estimates demand and then uses those estimates in supply-side equilibrium and cost inversion. It applies this methodological template to an emerging-market multichannel distribution and pricing context rather than revising Che et al.'s bounded-rationality pricing theory.
